source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/01_DHF/03_A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW/DHF DMR/10. 설계변경 문서/(A-TCF-5-019-A-040) 2G 1417, DK社 Deco Sheet 변경 요청 및 BOM 변경 件_2024.12.05/설계변경 문서/첨부문서/A1417MCW-DK(BOM).xlsx

sourceSummary.oneLine: BOM listing for A1417MCW / 2G 1417 detector assembly, DK deco sheet, packing, accessories, and component quantities.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports device master record or design-change traceability by identifying part numbers, material specifications, units, quantities, and assembly hierarchy for the A1417MCW 2G 1417 configuration.
keyPoints: Top-level BOM item is 1417_DK_DECO_SHEET with product number MSH-100009 and specification 2G&3G_1417_DECO_SHEET.
A1417MCW_ASSY is listed as ASM-100003 with specification 2G_A1417MCW_ASSY.
Detector materials include A-Si TFT Panel, Al Sheet, Cesium Iodide, Thallium Iodide, UV resin side sealant, PBA, ROIC, and gate-driver components.

Accessory set ACCSET-MCW(2G) includes power cord, CAT7 LAN cables, IEC60332-1 harness, Li-ion polymer batteries, power box, charger, recharger adaptor, ferrite core, and AC1200 Archer C64 Wi-Fi router.

evidence.evidenceText: BOM레벨 제품명 제품번호 규격 투입단위 총소요량 조립위치 비고

evidence.claim: The top-level listed product is 1417_DK_DECO_SHEET, product number MSH-100009, specification 2G&3G_1417_DECO_SHEET, quantity 1 EA.
The BOM includes A1417MCW_ASSY, product number ASM-100003, specification 2G_A1417MCW_ASSY, quantity 1 EA.
The A1417MCW assembly includes A1417MCW-MT process or subassembly.
The detector panel item is HME(INC)-1417-530N_NA with dimensions 440(L) x 520(W) x 0.7(t), CsI 500 um, and Al Sheet.
The BOM lists an A-Si TFT panel with product number P-AC3-NAN and dimensions 440(L) x 520(W) x 0.7(t).
evidence.evidenceText: 01-3-01-01-1 HME(INC)-1417 A-Si TFT Panel_도급 P-AC3-NAN [440(L)ⅹ520(W)ⅹ0.7(t)] TFT Panel A-Si_도급 EA 1

evidence.claim: The BOM lists Cesium Iodide material M20R1-001 with CsI purity entries of 99.999%, 99.99%, and recycle 99.99%, quantity 1.5 KG.
The BOM lists Thallium Iodide material M20R2-001 with purity 99.999%, beads, quantity 10 G.
evidence.evidenceText: 01-3-01-01-4 Thallium Iodide M20R2-001 Thallium Iodide(99.999%),beads G 10

evidence.claim: The BOM lists ROIC assembly ASSY PBA-ROIC_2G with product number MI92-02781A.
evidence.evidenceText: 01-3-01-04 ASSY PBA-ROIC_2G MI92-02781A 2G Detector ROIC,PBA As EA 1

evidence.claim: The rear cover assembly is 2G_1417_REAR_COVER_ASSY with product number ASM-100001 and specification 2G_1417_REAR_COVER_ASSY(NON_BATTERY_COVER).
The middle block assembly is 2G_1417_MIDDLE_BLOCK_ASSY with product number ASM-100002.
The front carbon component is 2G_1417_FRONT_CARBON with product number MKK-100003.
The accessory set ACCSET-MCW(2G) includes a harness signal item specifying IEC60332-1.
The accessory set includes short and long CAT7 LAN cables.
The accessory set includes BATTERY-2G DETECTOR MI43-01011A, ELT-3S1PA, Li-ion Pol, quantity 2 EA.
evidence.evidenceText: 01-5-04 BATTERY-2G DETECTOR MI43-01011A ELT-3S1PA,Li-ion Pol EA 2

evidence.claim: The accessory set includes CHARGER-2G MI44-01041A-D, CHARGER-2G DETECTOR CHARGER;MSP-90W-12VC.
evidence.evidenceText: 01-5-09 CHARGER-2G MI44-01041A-D CHARGER-2G DETECTOR CHARGER;MSP-90W-12VC EA 1
